narrative:
Recovery Twp township has 1,117 registered voters, with 51.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 4.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 40.5 percentage points.
